title: auganthus mollis
intro: Auganthus mollis, also known as Mountain Ash or Rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its white flowers and red berries. The medicinal properties of Auganthus mollis include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Auganthus mollis, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, have been traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
